maay_maay.sr_imported: Organizer wa la soo geliye — hadde ka rig kaaga
maay_maay.sr_reset: Habeynte dib ayaa loo celiye qaabkii hore
maay_maay.sculpt_failed: Farshaxanke wu guuldarreeste — isku day sharax fudud.
maay_maay.assess_failed: Tababareke kama jawaabin — mar kale isku day.
maay_maay.sr_assessed: Jawaabte tababaraha wa diyaar hoosta builder panel-ke
maay_maay.recall_needs_more: Marka hore ku dar ugu yaraan 4 fikro 2 koox
maay_maay.sr_recall_started: Habka xusuuste: dhamaan fikrooyinke wa ku raceen tray-ge. Mid walba ku celi meeshiise.
maay_maay.sr_recall_complete: Adigu dib ad u rigtay dunidaade oo dhan xusuuste!
maay_maay.print_saved: One-pager wa la soo dejiye — fur ee daabac
maay_maay.import_replaces: Tan wa ay beddeli doonta composition-kaaga hadde.
maay_maay.title: Foomam Xor a
maay_maay.tagline: Rig Dunidaade Foomamke: door archetypal structure, ku buuxi ideas-kaaga, ku habee 3D, ee qor waxe muhiimke a.
maay_maay.tagline2: Halkan adigu wa qoraage — AI keliya wa tilmaame, ee keliya marke ad codsate.
maay_maay.keep_content_hint: Kooxaha iyo fikrooyinke way sii jiraan — doorashde foomke keliya wa ay beddeshaa qaabke meeshe.
maay_maay.print_tip: Soo deji one-pager la daabici karo (snapshot + ideas-kaaga + jawaabte tababaraha)
maay_maay.recall_tip: Fikrooyinke wa ay ku raacaan tray-ge — ka soo celi xusuuste
maay_maay.assess_needs_items: Marka hore ku dar ugu yaraan 3 ideas
maay_maay.assess_tip: Weydii AI coach-ke inu eego composition-kaaga oo dhan
maay_maay.recall_instructions: Dhamaan fikrooyinke wa ay ka raaceen meeshoodii ee galeen tray-ge hoose. Door fikra meeshe, ka dibna isticmaal group chips (ama furaha [ iyo ]) si ad guriga ugu dirto. Waxba lama keydiyo inta ciyaarte socoto.
maay_maay.recall_complete: dib ad u rigtay dunidaade oo dhan!
maay_maay.studio_loading: Wa la soo rarayaa shape studio…
maay_maay.no_3d: Halkan lama soo raro 3D space — builder panel-kaaga weli wu shaqeynaya, waxe walba oo ad qorto wa la keydiya.
maay_maay.stage_hint: Meeshe: jiid fikra si ad u rigto · jiid background si ad u wareejiso · scroll si ad u weyneyso · [ iyo ] way u guuriyaan fikrade la dooray kooxaha dhexdood.
